title: S.Chand Group Capital India is Hiring: Subject Matter Expert (Junior)

jsonLd.title: S.Chand Group Capital India is Hiring: Subject Matter Expert (Junior)
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at S.Chand Group Capital India. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Subject Matter Expert to strengthen our Raipur-based team.

About S.Chand Group Capital India:
S.Chand Group Capital India is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Maintain classroom discipline and create a positive learning environment
• Design formative and summative assessments aligned to learning objectives
• Collaborate with faculty on curriculum development initiatives
• Conduct parent-teacher meetings and update parents on student performance
• Conduct doubt-clearing sessions and remedial classes for weak students
• Utilize technology and digital tools to enhance learning outcomes
• Maintain student records and prepare progress reports

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Sc / M.Sc in Life Sciences
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Student Assessment
• Proficiency in Research Skills
• Proficiency in Curriculum Development
• Proficiency in Lesson Planning
• Proficiency in MS Office
• Proficiency in Special Education
• Proficiency in Classroom Management
• Proficiency in Communication Skills

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Professional development and training programs
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Raipur, Chhattisgarh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with S.Chand Group Capital India!
